settings.heading: Toffee Crunch Truffles 60g
settings.description:
Description:

A limited-edition masterpiece youʼll crave endlessly but can only savour for a short time. Think luscious pistachio, crunchy golden toffee, and rich dark chocolate in every bite. With limited stocks, this 100% clean indulgence wonʼt stick around—get it before itʼs gone!

Exact Ingredients:

Pistachio, 71% Vegan Dark Chocolate Cacao Mass, Cocoa Butter, Coconut Sugar, Emulsifier: Sunflower Lecithin E322, Keto Condensed Milk, Whole Milk Powder, Toffee Crunch Coconut Sugar), Tahina, Agave Syrup, Salt, Prebiotic Inulin Fiber


Allergens:

Contains Tree Nuts & Milk.


Suitable for Vegetarians


Preparation Guidelines:

Ready to Eat


Storage Details:

Best enjoyed at 18  22 C | Do Not Refrigerate
